issues slow over- rate in this ipi. season, matches took longer time to finish due to teams bowling at a slow over-rate. according to the ipl rules, an innings should be completed in 90 minutes, including two 5-minute strategic timeouts, and a complete match should be finished in stipulated 3 hours and 20 minutes. however, as of 5 april 2023, not a single innings had ended in the above-mentioned time frame. despite penalizing team captains, the over rates have seen little improvement. 58! english cricketer Jos Buttler appealed on twitter that the ipl matches should be sped up. due to the slow over-rates of the various teams, this season s matches finished after 11:30 pm (ist). ipl evening matches are scheduled to start at 7:30 pm and, therefore, should be concluded by 10:50 pm. impact player rule the 2023 season saw the introduction of the impact player rule which allowed for each team to provide a list of 5 players along with the list of their playing 11. of these 5 designated players, any impact player could then be bought on to feature in the match.!64 many cricket pundits criticised the new impact player rule because of the thought that this rule negates the role and involvement of all-rounders in the game.!65166 statistics and awards most runs player, team innings i runs i high score Shubman Gill, Gujarat Titans 17 890 i 129 Faf du Plessis Royal Challengers Bangalore 14 730 84 devon conway Chennai Super Kings 15 672 92 Virat Kohli Royal Challengers Bangalore 14 639 101 yashasvi jaiswal Rajasthan Royals 14 625 124. i orange cap source: iplt 20.com (https:/avww. ipit 20.com/stats/2023/mostruns?stats_type team )

indian premier league 2022 summary season review based on coverage of the 2022 indian premier league and its linked final page. chamoion top sun-scorer top wicket-taker Gujarat Titans Jos Buttler 863 yuzvendra chahal 27 season overview the 2022 indian premier league was the 15 th ipl season. it ran from 26 march to 29 may 2022, was administered by the bcci, used the twenty 20 format, and featured 10 teams and 74 matches. this season marked a structural shift because the league expanded from eight teams to ten. Gujarat Titans and Lucknow Super Giants entered the tournament for the first time, which forced a new group-based schedule. Gujarat Titans won the title in their debut season, beating Rajasthan Royals by seven wickets in the final at narendra modi stadium, anmedabad. tournament structure and venues the competition used a group stage and playolts format. with 10 teams, the league adopted two groups of five. each team played 14 league matches within a schedule based on group opponents and a paired cross-group opponent. league-stage matches were concentrated in maharashtra: mumbai, navi mumbai. and pune. the playoffs moved to kolkata and anmedabad. stage city stadium capacity league mumbai wankhede stadium 33.108 league mumbai brabourne stadium 20.000 league mumba dy patil stadium 55.000 league pune mca intemational stadium 45.000 playofts kolkata eden gardens 65.000 playotfs. ahmedabad narendra modi stadium 130,000 participating teams team group note Chennai Super Kings b defending champions oclhi capitals a league stage exit guyarat titans 3 new franchise; champions Kolkata Knight Riders a league stage exit Lucknow Super Giants a new franchise; reached eliminator Mumbai Indians a finished 10 th overall Punjab Kings b league stage exit

indian premier league 2023 summary season review based on coverage of the 2023 indian premier league and its linked final page. chamoion top sun-scorer top wicket-taker Chennai Super Kings Shubman Gill 890 Mohammed Shami 28 season overview the 2023 indian premier league was the 16 th ipl season. it ran from 31 march to 29 may 2023, featured 10 teams and 74 matches, and was organised by the bcci. the season restored the home-and-away format after a four-year break caused by pandemic-era venue restrictions. that made the tournament feel more like the older ipl and reconnected franchises with their home crowds. Chennai Super Kings won the title by beating Gujarat Titans by five wickets in the final using the dls method. the result gave chennai a fifth ipl title. drawing level with Mumbai Indians. tournament structure and venues the league retained the 10-team. 74-match structure from 2022, again using two groups of five teams for scheduling. each side played 14 league matches before the playoffs. the 2023 season also introduced the impact player rule and expanded use of drs to wides and no-balls. those were not minor tweaks; they changed match management and selection logic. team / stage primary city venue capacity Chennai Super Kings chennai m. a. chidambaram stadium 38.000 Delhi Capitals delhi arun jaitley stadium 35.200 Gujarat Titans ahmedabad narendra modi stadium 132,000 Kolkata Knight Riders kolkata eden gardens 68.000 oun super lucknow brsabv ekana stadium 50.000 Mumbai Indians mumbai wankhede stadium 33.108 Punjab Kings mohali / dharamshala is bindra stadium / hpca stadium 27.000 / 23.000 Rajasthan Royals jaipur / guwahati sawai mansingh / aca stadium 30.000 / 46.000 beegaioe bengaluru m. chinnaswamy stadium 40.000 sunnsers hyderabad hyderabad rajiv gandhi intemational stadium 55.000 participating teams team head coach captain Chennai Super Kings stephen fleming MS Dhoni Delhi Capitals ricky ponting david warner
